About / Resume

Bio

I'm Jorge Alvarez, a Business & Information Systems student at NJIT. My focus is on the intersection of technology and business — understanding how systems are built, how organizations run, and how software can improve both.

I'm drawn to projects that require clear thinking and disciplined execution. I build things that are practical, well-documented, and designed to be maintained, not just submitted.

Strengths and Interests

  • Business systems analysis and process documentation
  • Building practical software tools with clear scope and purpose
  • Leadership and collaborative project delivery
  • Technology strategy and how software decisions affect organizations
  • Writing clear documentation and structured specifications

Education

  • NJIT — Business and Information Systems, Expected May 2028
